title: KOCBridge login landing page
desc: Cinematic SaaS landing page inspired by Synex.xyz — editorial typography, floating glassmorphism cards, scroll animations.
prompt: Completely redesign the login page into a stunning long-scroll landing page with login form, inspired by premium Chinese SaaS product pages. Light blue and white color scheme, 3D illustrations, glassmorphism cards, smooth scrolling.

title: Dark particle login
desc: Full-screen particle system background with glassmorphism login card. Cinematic space-tech aesthetic.
prompt: Redesign the login page to match a dark, premium, space-tech aesthetic. Full dark background (#050810), animated particle system with blue/cyan glowing dots and connection lines, mouse interaction.
